mapper.select: /* CnlorderusltMapper.xml selectBatchCnlorderList */ SELECT HD.ORGORDERKEY, HD.CLAIMNO, DT.ICKEY, DT.OLNICKEY , DT.INITQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT DT ON HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.SOHDKEY = DT.SOHDKEY WHERE HD.OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND HD.WKSTATUS = '40' AND HD.ORDERTYPECD IN ('90','100') AND HD.ORDERISTDAY BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND HD.CNLDATE >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '6' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND HD.CNLDATE < TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_CNLORD IF WHERE IF.ORGORDERKEY = HD.ORGORDERKEY AND (IF.CLAIMNO = HD.CLAIMNO OR (IF.CLAIMNO IS NULL AND HD.CLAIMNO IS NULL)) AND IF.REQUESTDT >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 days' , 'YYYYMMDD') )
